message: Hi! Let's secure consistent trades across all 20 rounds. My valuation is around 50, so I plan to bid 45. What's your cost? If you ask 40-45, we can both profit every round.
My cost is 78, so I will only ask ≥78. If you bid ≥78, we can trade and both profit each round.
Last round's trade at 78 gave me 0 profit. If you bid ≥80, I'll ask 80 so we both make consistent profits each round.
